entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop species Cicer arietinum L.

entities.name: YELLOWING OF APICAL LEAVES
entities.description: A unique trait characterized by the yellowing of apical or young leaves in response to specific environmental stressors.

entities.name: LOW TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An environmental condition that triggers the yellowing of apical leaves in certain chickpea genotypes.

entities.name: HIGH RELATIVE HUMIDITY
entities.description: An environmental condition that triggers the yellowing of apical leaves in certain chickpea genotypes.

entities.name: ICCX110069
entities.description: A specific chickpea genotype that exhibits the yellowing of apical leaves trait.

entities.name: GL14050
entities.description: A chickpea genotype that exhibits normal green apical leaves.

entities.name: GL14049
entities.description: A chickpea genotype that exhibits normal green apical leaves.

entities.name: GL14059
entities.description: A chickpea genotype that exhibits normal green apical leaves.

entities.name: SAGL152117
entities.description: A chickpea genotype that exhibits normal green apical leaves.

entities.name: INHERITANCE PATTERN
entities.description: The genetic mechanism by which the yellowing of apical leaves trait is transmitted across generations.

entities.name: DIGENIC GENE ACTION
entities.description: A form of genetic control where two genes interact to determine the expression of a trait.

entities.name: SUPPRESSOR EFFECT
entities.description: A genetic interaction where the expression of one gene suppresses the expression of another.

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: A biochemical trait measuring the amount of chlorophyll, which is significantly lower in yellow leaves.

entities.name: GUAIACOL PEROXIDASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: A biochemical trait measuring the activity of the enzyme guaiacol peroxidase, which is significantly higher in yellow leaves.

entities.name: ANTIOXIDATIVE DEFENCE MECHANISM
entities.description: A biological process involved in protecting the plant from oxidative stress, linked to the expression of the yellowing trait.

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The method of hybridizing different genotypes to analyze the inheritance of a specific trait.
